decisions.subject: audit_logs: Allow authenticated users to insert audit logs
relatedObjects: public.audit_logs.Allow authenticated users to insert audit logs
decisions.productionBehavior: PERMISSIVE INSERT policy for roles authenticated; USING=none; WITH CHECK=true. Authenticated users can insert and read every audit row; no tenant predicate.
decisions.recommendation: REPLACE_IN_BASELINE ? Add a tenant key; service-role-only insert; clinic-scoped SELECT for super_admin/admin/auditor; no direct client update/delete.
alternatives: ACCEPT_AS_BASELINE to preserve current broad access.
EXCLUDE_FROM_BASELINE and rely on deny-by-default RLS until a replacement is approved.
validationRequirements: Verify INSERT as anon, authenticated non-member, authorized member roles, and service_role.
Verify cross-clinic access is denied for audit_logs.
Verify USING and WITH CHECK prevent tenant-key reassignment.
notes: Tenant boundary: No clinic_id exists.
Runtime dependency: Audit writer, audit page, dashboard, reports, assistant activity.
Recommended disposition: REPLACE_IN_BASELINE.

decisions.subject: Authoritative role and clinic-membership model
decisions.productionBehavior: Five application role strings are read from user_roles by email and enforced mainly in client components; database policies do not enforce roles or membership.
decisions.recommendation: Adopt auth-user-linked clinic memberships as database authority: super_admin is platform-wide and tightly assigned; admin manages one or more clinics; clinical_staff operates clinical workflows in member clinics; doctor reads/creates patient traceability in member clinics; auditor is read-only in member clinics. Derive authorization from auth.uid() through a membership relation. Never trust client-supplied role or email.
alternatives: Keep email-keyed global roles and accept no database tenant boundary.
Store roles only in JWT custom claims; requires controlled claim refresh and still needs clinic membership.
validationRequirements: Test every role against every command class.
Test users with zero, one, and multiple clinic memberships.
Test disabled memberships and role changes without stale privilege.
Test that client-side UI checks are not the security boundary.
notes: Single source of truth: server-managed database membership keyed to auth.users.id.

decisions.subject: Unauthenticated and service-role access
decisions.productionBehavior: Several policies grant PUBLIC access; deployment tables are deny-by-default and deployment RPCs are service-role oriented.
decisions.recommendation: Grant anon no application-table access. Authenticated access is membership and role scoped. Service role may bypass/directly access only in trusted server processes and execute deployment RPCs. Browser clients must never receive service-role credentials.
alternatives: Preserve selected public workflows.
Expose narrowly scoped SECURITY DEFINER RPCs for specific anonymous workflows after threat review.
validationRequirements: Assert anon SELECT/INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE denial on all 21 tables.
Assert service role is available only in server modules.
Scan browser bundles and environment exposure for service credentials.

decisions.subject: Patient external identity
decisions.productionBehavior: Production has two equivalent UNIQUE constraints on nullable external_id, globally scoped.
decisions.recommendation: Keep one named unique rule and make identity clinic-scoped: unique (clinic_id, source_system, external_id) for non-null external_id; allow multiple nulls and setup drafts.
alternatives: Preserve current Production definition.
Enforce global uniqueness.
validationRequirements: Validate duplicate nulls are allowed.
Reject duplicate non-null external identity within a clinic/source.
Allow the same external identity in different clinics or source systems.
Inventory Production duplicates before migration.

decisions.subject: Provider identity
decisions.productionBehavior: Production globally enforces two normalized full-name variants and separately clinic-scopes deployment keys.
decisions.recommendation: Retain clinic-scoped deployment-key uniqueness; replace global name uniqueness with clinic-scoped normalized-name uniqueness for active/non-archived providers. Permit null deployment keys and setup drafts.
alternatives: Preserve current Production definition.
Enforce global uniqueness.
validationRequirements: Inventory cross-clinic and same-clinic normalized duplicates.
Test Dr/Dre normalization, inactive/archive transitions, null keys, and concurrent inserts.

decisions.subject: Sterilizer identity
decisions.productionBehavior: Production globally enforces lower/trimmed name uniqueness and clinic-scopes non-null deployment keys.
decisions.recommendation: Retain clinic-scoped deployment-key uniqueness; make normalized name unique per clinic for non-archived rows. Permit planned drafts with null deployment keys.
alternatives: Preserve current Production definition.
Enforce global uniqueness.
validationRequirements: Inventory normalized duplicates by clinic.
Allow equal names in different clinics.
Test planned, active, archived, null-key, and concurrent insert behavior.

decisions.subject: Workstation ordering index
decisions.productionBehavior: Production has a non-unique composite index (display_order, name); repository has a non-unique display_order-only index. Neither enforces ordering uniqueness.
decisions.recommendation: Use the Production composite index as authoritative for deterministic ordering; do not add a uniqueness constraint unless product rules later require unique display positions per clinic.
alternatives: Preserve current Production definition.
Enforce global uniqueness.
validationRequirements: Compare query plans for ORDER BY display_order,name.
Allow tied and null display_order values.
Verify stable name ordering within ties.

decisions.subject: Printer model and connection checks
decisions.productionBehavior: Checks are present but NOT VALID; new/updated rows are checked while pre-existing violations may remain.
decisions.recommendation: Use validated constraints in a clean baseline after enumerating supported values in one shared application/domain contract. Production needs preflight cleanup then VALIDATE or replacement.
alternatives: Preserve all Production defaults and nullable behavior.
Make all fields non-null regardless of lifecycle state.
validationRequirements: Test planned, active, inactive/archived and local deployment cases.
Test invalid combinations and transition boundaries.
Confirm application, deployment engine, environment, and database each have one non-overlapping source-of-truth responsibility.

decisions.subject: Local print-agent URL default
decisions.productionBehavior: Database defaults to http://localhost:8787.
decisions.recommendation: Remove the database default. Deployment engine/application configuration chooses an agent endpoint; environment configuration supplies host/port. Store an explicit per-clinic value only after provisioning.
alternatives: Preserve all Production defaults and nullable behavior.
Make all fields non-null regardless of lifecycle state.
validationRequirements: Test planned, active, inactive/archived and local deployment cases.
Test invalid combinations and transition boundaries.
Confirm application, deployment engine, environment, and database each have one non-overlapping source-of-truth responsibility.

decisions.subject: Printer network defaults
decisions.productionBehavior: Connection defaults to wifi and port 9100; IP is nullable.
decisions.recommendation: Keep port/model suggestions in deployment/application defaults, not schema defaults; require connection-specific validation and allow null network fields for USB/unplanned printers.
alternatives: Preserve all Production defaults and nullable behavior.
Make all fields non-null regardless of lifecycle state.
validationRequirements: Test planned, active, inactive/archived and local deployment cases.
Test invalid combinations and transition boundaries.
Confirm application, deployment engine, environment, and database each have one non-overlapping source-of-truth responsibility.

decisions.subject: Agent URL expectations
decisions.productionBehavior: Agent URL checks accept http or https and permit null.
decisions.recommendation: Keep nullable for planned/inactive rows; require a normalized HTTPS URL for active remote agents, with explicitly approved loopback HTTP only for local deployment mode. Deployment engine is source of provisioning state; environment config is source of endpoint discovery.
alternatives: Preserve all Production defaults and nullable behavior.
Make all fields non-null regardless of lifecycle state.
validationRequirements: Test planned, active, inactive/archived and local deployment cases.
Test invalid combinations and transition boundaries.
Confirm application, deployment engine, environment, and database each have one non-overlapping source-of-truth responsibility.

decisions.subject: Planned and inactive provisioning
decisions.productionBehavior: Production supports planned/placeholder/active/archived-like states with several nullable deployment fields.
decisions.recommendation: Preserve nullable identifiers for planned drafts, but enforce state-dependent checks: active objects require clinic ownership and required operational identity; archived objects cannot receive new assignments.
alternatives: Preserve all Production defaults and nullable behavior.
Make all fields non-null regardless of lifecycle state.
validationRequirements: Test planned, active, inactive/archived and local deployment cases.
Test invalid combinations and transition boundaries.
Confirm application, deployment engine, environment, and database each have one non-overlapping source-of-truth responsibility.

decisions.subject: activate_deployment_clinic
relatedObjects: public.activate_deployment_clinic(p_clinic_id uuid, p_deployment_run_key text, p_session_id uuid, p_execution_key text, p_claimant_id text, p_ownership_token text, p_expected_lease_expires_at timestamp with time zone, p_item_id uuid, p_execution_item_key text, p_plan_item_key text, p_expected_item_started_at timestamp with time zone, p_expected_attempt_count integer, p_expected_current_state jsonb, p_target_state jsonb, p_proposed_activated_at timestamp with time zone)
decisions.productionBehavior: Captured as SECURITY INVOKER; search_path='public', 'pg_temp'; Production ACL revokes PUBLIC and grants service_role. Runtime calls the RPC from a server repository.
decisions.recommendation: Include the exact normalized Production/repository signature as a service-role-only RPC. Revoke PUBLIC/anon/authenticated EXECUTE. Require fixed trusted search_path, fully qualified objects, tenant equality across clinic/run/session/item/entity rows, ownership/lease/idempotency checks, and strict input/JSON shape validation.
alternatives: Allow authenticated direct execution with membership checks.
Replace with direct table mutations.
decisions.productionCompatibility: preserves and codifies Production service-role behavior
validationRequirements: Compare identity arguments, defaults, result columns, body hash and function attributes.
Assert PUBLIC, anon and authenticated cannot execute; service_role can.
Test cross-clinic identifiers, stale lease/token, replay, malformed JSON, wrong entity identity and concurrent calls.
notes: FLAG: accepts client-supplied p_clinic_id; authorization must not rely on it alone.
Ownership token is part of the contract.

notes: FLAG: accepts client-supplied p_clinic_id; authorization must not rely on it alone.
Ownership token is part of the contract.

decisions.subject: start_deployment_activation_execution_item
relatedObjects: public.start_deployment_activation_execution_item(p_clinic_id uuid, p_deployment_run_key text, p_session_id uuid, p_execution_key text, p_claimant_id text, p_ownership_token text, p_expected_lease_expires_at timestamp with time zone, p_item_id uuid, p_execution_item_key text, p_plan_item_key text, p_expected_sequence integer, p_expected_action text, p_expected_entity_type text, p_expected_entity_key text, p_proposed_started_at timestamp with time zone, p_expected_attempt_count integer)
decisions.productionBehavior: Captured as SECURITY INVOKER; search_path='public', 'pg_temp'; Production ACL revokes PUBLIC and grants service_role. Runtime calls the RPC from a server repository.
decisions.recommendation: Include the exact normalized Production/repository signature as a service-role-only RPC. Revoke PUBLIC/anon/authenticated EXECUTE. Require fixed trusted search_path, fully qualified objects, tenant equality across clinic/run/session/item/entity rows, ownership/lease/idempotency checks, and strict input/JSON shape validation.
alternatives: Allow authenticated direct execution with membership checks.
Replace with direct table mutations.

decisions.subject: Trigger helper set_clinical_agents_updated_at
decisions.productionBehavior: Captured trigger helper, SECURITY INVOKER, search_path=not fixed in parsed metadata.
decisions.recommendation: Include as a non-client-callable trigger helper. Revoke PUBLIC/anon/authenticated EXECUTE, use SECURITY INVOKER unless a reviewed need requires definer, set a fixed trusted search_path, and attach only to its named trigger.
alternatives: Rely on default function EXECUTE privileges.
Inline timestamp behavior in clients.
decisions.productionCompatibility: tightens function ACL while preserving trigger behavior
validationRequirements: Verify trigger fires on intended events only.
Verify timestamp mutation and returned NEW row.
Verify direct browser-role execution is denied.

decisions.subject: PostgreSQL and extension prerequisites
decisions.productionBehavior: Filtered capture emits no CREATE EXTENSION objects although defaults use gen_random_uuid().
decisions.recommendation: Treat compatible PostgreSQL/Supabase version and gen_random_uuid() availability as environment assertions; do not guess or application-own an extension without platform confirmation.
alternatives: Copy platform objects into application baseline.
Leave prerequisite implicit.
validationRequirements: Fail baseline preflight when prerequisite identity/version/function/role is missing.
Verify application baseline creates no Supabase-managed object.

decisions.subject: Supabase-managed schemas
decisions.productionBehavior: Capture contains platform-managed schemas and objects.
decisions.recommendation: Assert auth, storage and extensions schemas exist at compatible versions; never recreate their internal tables/functions/triggers in the application baseline.
alternatives: Copy platform objects into application baseline.
Leave prerequisite implicit.
validationRequirements: Fail baseline preflight when prerequisite identity/version/function/role is missing.
Verify application baseline creates no Supabase-managed object.

decisions.subject: Authentication dependencies
decisions.productionBehavior: Application tables reference auth.users and authorization should use authenticated identity.
decisions.recommendation: Reference but do not create auth.users/auth helpers. Membership records must FK to auth.users.id and policies must derive identity from auth.uid().
alternatives: Copy platform objects into application baseline.
Leave prerequisite implicit.
validationRequirements: Fail baseline preflight when prerequisite identity/version/function/role is missing.
Verify application baseline creates no Supabase-managed object.

decisions.subject: Storage dependency
decisions.productionBehavior: Storage structures exist but no SteriSphere bucket or storage policy source/usage was established.
decisions.recommendation: Exclude storage objects from application baseline; add separate configuration only if an explicit runtime storage dependency is later proven.
alternatives: Copy platform objects into application baseline.
Leave prerequisite implicit.
validationRequirements: Fail baseline preflight when prerequisite identity/version/function/role is missing.
Verify application baseline creates no Supabase-managed object.

decisions.subject: Required roles
decisions.productionBehavior: Capture ACLs reference Supabase roles.
decisions.recommendation: Assert roles are platform-provided. Application baseline grants no role creation and uses an approved least-privilege ACL matrix.
alternatives: Copy platform objects into application baseline.
Leave prerequisite implicit.
validationRequirements: Fail baseline preflight when prerequisite identity/version/function/role is missing.
Verify application baseline creates no Supabase-managed object.

decisions.subject: Cryptographic functions
decisions.productionBehavior: UUID generation is the only identified cryptographic function dependency.
decisions.recommendation: Assert function availability and UUID v4 behavior; no other cryptographic extension is application-owned unless normalized function analysis proves a dependency.
alternatives: Copy platform objects into application baseline.
Leave prerequisite implicit.
validationRequirements: Fail baseline preflight when prerequisite identity/version/function/role is missing.
Verify application baseline creates no Supabase-managed object.

decisions.subject: Clinics definition
decisions.productionBehavior: Production and supabase_clinics.sql represent the evolved clinic lifecycle; supabase_deployment_core.sql conflicts.
decisions.recommendation: Use normalized Production plus supabase_clinics.sql; exclude core definition and duplicate helper.
alternatives: Prefer repository text without Production normalization.
Copy raw dump definitions including environment noise.
validationRequirements: Compare normalized catalog definitions and dependency graph.
Ignore identifier spelling only when semantic definition is equivalent.
Require explicit review for every genuine difference.

decisions.subject: Deployment runs definition
decisions.productionBehavior: Production and supabase_deployment_runs.sql represent evolved identity/lifecycle/recovery; core conflicts.
decisions.recommendation: Use normalized Production plus evolved repository definition; exclude core fields/indexes.
alternatives: Prefer repository text without Production normalization.
Copy raw dump definitions including environment noise.
validationRequirements: Compare normalized catalog definitions and dependency graph.
Ignore identifier spelling only when semantic definition is equivalent.
Require explicit review for every genuine difference.

decisions.subject: set_clinics_updated_at
decisions.productionBehavior: Production sets NEW.updated_at=now(), returns NEW, and fixes search_path to public.
decisions.recommendation: Use the evolved Production helper once, with fixed trusted search_path and restricted direct execute ACL.
alternatives: Prefer repository text without Production normalization.
Copy raw dump definitions including environment noise.
validationRequirements: Compare normalized catalog definitions and dependency graph.
Ignore identifier spelling only when semantic definition is equivalent.
Require explicit review for every genuine difference.

decisions.subject: Long PostgreSQL identifiers
decisions.productionBehavior: Catalog names reflect identifier-length outcomes while definitions correspond to repository intentions.
decisions.recommendation: Treat equivalent normalized definitions as equal; choose explicit <=63-byte canonical names for baseline metadata.
alternatives: Prefer repository text without Production normalization.
Copy raw dump definitions including environment noise.
validationRequirements: Compare normalized catalog definitions and dependency graph.
Ignore identifier spelling only when semantic definition is equivalent.
Require explicit review for every genuine difference.

decisions.subject: Function and RPC attributes
decisions.productionBehavior: Names match, but complete attribute equality must include signatures, defaults, results, volatility, security, search_path, body and ACL.
decisions.recommendation: Production-normalize every attribute; repository body is accepted only when normalized equality is proven. Any mismatch is an explicit forward-migration decision.
alternatives: Prefer repository text without Production normalization.
Copy raw dump definitions including environment noise.
validationRequirements: Compare normalized catalog definitions and dependency graph.
Ignore identifier spelling only when semantic definition is equivalent.
Require explicit review for every genuine difference.

decisions.subject: Constraints and validation state
decisions.productionBehavior: Most constraints match evolved sources; missing-base constraints come only from Production; printer checks are NOT VALID and patient external identity is duplicated.
decisions.recommendation: Use Production definitions except approved UNIQUE/HARDWARE decisions; all clean-baseline checks should be valid after zero-row creation.
alternatives: Prefer repository text without Production normalization.
Copy raw dump definitions including environment noise.
validationRequirements: Compare normalized catalog definitions and dependency graph.
Ignore identifier spelling only when semantic definition is equivalent.
Require explicit review for every genuine difference.

decisions.subject: Triggers and defaults
decisions.productionBehavior: Ten Production triggers match current active objects; repository-only planning triggers are absent. Defaults include schema and environment policy choices.
decisions.recommendation: Include the ten live triggers, exclude planning triggers, preserve deterministic domain defaults, and move environment/deployment defaults out of the database as decided in HARDWARE items.
alternatives: Prefer repository text without Production normalization.
Copy raw dump definitions including environment noise.
validationRequirements: Compare normalized catalog definitions and dependency graph.
Ignore identifier spelling only when semantic definition is equivalent.
Require explicit review for every genuine difference.
